title: No Hunger
description: Remove hunger and enable eat to heal. Better foods give overtime healing whilest snacks instantly heal.
body:
Summary
-------

No Hunger removes the hunger bar adding a new healing mechanic: better foods heal overtime and "snacks" heal instantly.

The mod
-------

Remove hunger and add back heal from eating, similar to Beta 1.7.3, but with a different mechanic. Better foods (as meat) heal over time, whilst, instead, snacks heal instantly.

Works best with [Insane's Survival Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-reborn)
